Operation 'dataportability.accessType.check' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description is too brief and lacks context about what 'access type' means and why an agent would use this operation. Added explanation of purpose, output information, and use case context for AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Gets the access type of the token.
data.description_suggestion: Determines the access type (scope level) of the provided OAuth token. This operation validates the token's authorization level and returns the access type classification. Use this to verify that the token has sufficient permissions before initiating data portability operations.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is too brief and lacks context about what 'access type' means and why an agent would use this operation. Added explanation of purpose, output information, and use case context for AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'dataportability.authorization.reset' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is verbose and somewhat unclear about the return value. Reorganized for clarity, emphasized the timing constraints more clearly, and explicitly noted the empty response to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Revokes OAuth tokens and resets exhausted scopes for a user/project pair. This method allows you to initiate a request after a new consent is granted. This method also indicates that previous archives can be garbage collected. You should call this method when all jobs are complete and all archives are downloaded. Do not call it only when you start a new job.
data.summary_suggestion: Reset authorization and revoke OAuth tokens
data.description_suggestion: Revokes OAuth tokens and resets exhausted scopes for a user/project pair, enabling new authorization requests after fresh consent is granted. This operation marks previous archives for garbage collection and should only be called after all portability jobs are complete and archives have been downloaded. Returns an empty response on success. Do not call this when initiating new jobs.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is verbose and somewhat unclear about the return value. Reorganized for clarity, emphasized the timing constraints more clearly, and explicitly noted the empty response to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'dataportability.portabilityArchive.initiate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description lacks detail about inputs (what resources can be specified), outputs (what is returned), and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Added information about request parameters, response structure, and how to monitor job progress for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Initiates a new Archive job for the Portability API.
data.summary_suggestion: Start a new data portability archive job
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new Archive job to export user data from Google services. Requires specifying the resources to be archived in the request. Returns an InitiatePortabilityArchiveResponse containing the job ID and initial state. The archive job runs asynchronously and can be monitored using the getPortabilityArchiveState operation.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks detail about inputs (what resources can be specified), outputs (what is returned), and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Added information about request parameters, response structure, and how to monitor job progress for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Retrieves the state of an Archive job for the Portability API.
data.summary_suggestion: Get archive job status and state
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current state and status of a specific Archive job identified by its resource name. Returns a PortabilityArchiveState object containing job progress, completion status, and any error information. Use this operation to monitor the progress of an initiated archive job and determine when data is ready for download.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too generic and doesn't explain the required input parameter (resource name) or what information is returned in the state object. Added details about the parameter requirement, response schema, and typical use case for monitoring job progress.

message: Operation 'dataportability.archiveJobs.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description lacks critical details about the resource name parameter, return value, and important side effects (data loss, job state constraints). data.description_suggestion: Cancels an in-progress Portability Archive job identified by its resource name. Returns a CancelPortabilityArchiveResponse. Once cancelled, the job cannot be resumed and any partial data generated will be discarded. This operation is only valid for jobs that are still running; completed or already-cancelled jobs cannot be cancelled again.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks critical details about the resource name parameter, return value, and important side effects (data loss, job state constraints). Added information about parameter requirements, response type, and state transition rules to help AI agents understand when this operation is appropriate.

message: Operation 'dataportability.archiveJobs.retry' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description lacks details about the resource name parameter, return value, and important constraints (only for failed jobs). Added information about parameter requirements, response structure, and the fact that retry restarts the process from the beginning to help AI agents determine when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retries a failed Portability Archive job.
data.description_suggestion: Retries a failed Portability Archive job identified by its resource name. Returns a RetryPortabilityArchiveResponse containing the new job state. This operation creates a new attempt to complete the archive and is only valid for jobs in a failed state. Successful retry will restart data collection from the beginning.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks details about the resource name parameter, return value, and important constraints (only for failed jobs). Added information about parameter requirements, response structure, and the fact that retry restarts the process from the beginning to help AI agents determine when to use this operation.
